name: Sugar Free Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine and Sugar Twin until smooth.
2. Add the egg, vanilla, non-fat dry milk, and water to the mixture. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
3. Fold in the diced Diatetic choc candy.
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
